title: The Notaries Act, 1952
full_text: The Notaries Act, 1952 नोटेरी अधिनियम, 1952 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1952-53 Act Number: 53 Enactment Date: 1952-08-09 Act Year: 1952 Short Title: The Notaries Act, 1952 Hindi Title: नोटेरी अधिनियम, 1952 Long Title: An Act to regulate the profession of notaries. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Department of Legal Affairs Enforcement Date: 14-02-1956 Notification: 14th February, 1956: vide notification No. S.R.O. 317, dated 10th February, 1956, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, s. 3. TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Notaries Act, 1952 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power to appoint notaries. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Registers. Section 5. Entry of names in the Register and issue or renewal of certificates of practice. Section 6. Annual publication of lists of notaries. Section 7. Seal of notaries. Section 8. Functions of notaries. Section 9. Bar of practice without certificate. Section 10. Removal of names from Register. Section 11. Construction of references to notaries public in other laws. Section 12. Penalty for falsely representing to be a notary, etc. Section 13. Cognizance of offence. Section 14. Reciprocal arrangements for recognition of notarial acts done by foreign notaries. Section 15. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 16. Repealed.
